title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Ideogram 4.0 resolves long-standing text generation failures in AI image models, outperforming Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on certain benchmarks. The tool is free and handles logos, signs, and infographics with accurate text rendering.
writeup: The video reviews Ideogram 4.0, a free AI image generator, focusing on its handling of in-image text, a persistent weak point for diffusion models. It positions the tool against Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro, claiming Ideogram outperforms both on certain benchmarks. The concrete takeaways: text rendering is accurate enough for logos, signs, and infographics, and the tool carries no cost to use.
